cards.back: An iterative and incremental approach to project management that emphasizes flexibility and collaboration
A specific implementation of Agile Methodology that emphasizes teamwork, accountability, and iterative progress toward well-defined goals
A role responsible for defining and prioritizing the product backlog, ensuring that it reflects the needs and goals of the stakeholders
A time-boxed iteration in the Scrum Framework, during which the team works on a specific set of tasks and delivers a working product increment
A collection of features, tasks, and requirements that are prioritized and ready to be developed, managed by the Product Owner in the Scrum Framework
